explanation: Inserted quotes around the executable name to test if the Sigma rule accounts for such mutations. The command remains functionally identical.
Inserted extra space after the executable path to test if the Sigma rule accounts for spacing variations.
Used short form of the command line without any mutation. This is the original command for reference.
Reordered flags and arguments where possible, but in this case, the order is fixed by the bitsadmin.exe syntax, so no reordering was applied.
Removed optional elements where possible, but in this case, all elements are required for the command to function as intended.
Used standard syntax without any encoding or recoding, as encoding is not typically applied to bitsadmin.exe command lines.
